user.title: Connect to Checkmk
user.description: Enter the API credentials, then continue to refresh the available hosts and services.

hosts.title: Select hosts
hosts.description: Select exact hosts or complement the selection with advanced patterns.

data_description.host_include: Case-insensitive wildcards or re: expressions. Example: *qsv* or re:^srv-[0-9]+$
data_description.host_exclude: Exclusions take priority over selections and includes.

services.title: Select services
services.description: Services are limited to the selected or matching hosts.

data_description.selected_services: Service names loaded from the selected hosts.
data_description.service_include: Case-insensitive wildcards or re: expressions. Example: CPU* or re:^(CPU|Memory)$
data_description.service_exclude: Exclusions take priority over selections and includes.

error.invalid_regex: At least one re: expression is invalid.
error.invalid_response: Checkmk returned an invalid or empty response.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while loading Checkmk data.

init.title: Refresh Checkmk discovery
init.description: Check the connection settings, then continue to reload hosts and services from Checkmk.

hosts.title: Select hosts
hosts.description: Select exact hosts or complement the selection with advanced patterns.

data_description.host_include: Case-insensitive wildcards or re: expressions. Example: *qsv* or re:^srv-[0-9]+$
data_description.host_exclude: Exclusions take priority over selections and includes.

services.title: Select services
services.description: Services are limited to the selected or matching hosts.

data_description.selected_services: Service names loaded from the selected hosts.
data_description.service_include: Case-insensitive wildcards or re: expressions. Example: CPU* or re:^(CPU|Memory)$
data_description.service_exclude: Exclusions take priority over selections and includes.

error.invalid_regex: At least one re: expression is invalid.
error.invalid_response: Checkmk returned an invalid or empty response.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while loading Checkmk data.
